race.comment: LUSKAIRE (10) talented gelding with his hoof on the till. Loomed strongly with the 56kg for a determined second over this trip at Rosehill from back in the field. Drops a further 4kg for this after the claim and looks hard to hold out. ANYTHINK GOES (12) backs-up quickly after scoring a convincing win in easier grade over 2000m at Rosehill last Saturday. Is just as effective over this trip and adept in all conditions. Sure to go close. ROTAGILLA (6) warmed up late off the muddling tempo with a respectable third over 1810m at Eagle Farm. Fresh again and doesn't have to improve much to take this out. SLY BOOTS (11) D-Day is looming fifth-up and expect to see him race much closer from the inside gate. Chipped away late when back in trip for a plugging fourth over 1800m at this track. Key jockey change and can figure prominently. TAZIMA (4) talented gelding going nicely through the grades. Doesn't get the same map favours here and place claims preferred.
